---
title: "Index"
author: "Morde Bernstein, Marley McGehee, Kimberly McNeil"
date: "5/05/2026"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, 
                      error = FALSE, 
                      message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```

## Project One

For this project we analyzed data from a Global Coral Bleaching Database. We focused on three variables, maximum percent bleached, average percent mortality, and region of coral. To read more about this [click here]()

## Project Two

## Project Three

[click here](Project-3.html)
